title.en: As the years passed, the number of high-level i...

content.en:
As the years passed, the number of high-level immeasurable lifeforms on the fourth layer of the Relic Stone Tower had increased, but there were currently no high-level immeasurable lifeforms that could fully complete the incomplete immeasurable maps on all the stone tablets and meet the standards of the Relic Stone Tower.

Even the Great Ancestor of the Bloody Blood and the Great Ancestor of the Star Sea are currently trapped on the last stone tablet, and it is not certain whether they can be successfully completed in the end.

Finally.

The Blood Ancestor was the first to complete it, and the Ruins Stone Tower immediately gave the Blood Ancestor a benefit.

Rumble!

A blood-colored crystal the size of a football appeared in the hand of the Blood Ancestor.

Seeing this blood-colored crystal, the pupils of many high-level immeasurable lifeforms shrank, and even the Great Ancestor of the Star Sea showed longing.

"It turned out to be one of the most suitable treasures for the third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms - Blood Geng Source Crystal!"

As for the Blood Geng Source Crystal, some high-level immeasurable lifeforms have only heard of it, but they have not seen it yet.

It is rumored that a batch of Blood Geng Source Crystals was born in the Nine Shadows Blood Abyss, and even attracted the high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the fourth stage, and a great war broke out.

They weren't surprised that there were Blood Geng Source Crystals in the Ruins Stone Tower, but when the Blood Ancestor obtained the Blood Geng Source Crystals, they were jealous!

The key problem is that the Blood Geng Source Crystal can greatly refine immeasurable blood, which is enough to make the strength of the third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms skyrocket.

Even if it was a high-level immeasurable lifeform that had just broken through to the third stage, if it was cultivated with the Blood Geng Source Crystal, it was possible to increase tens of thousands of immeasurable blood drops at one time.

If there were enough Blood Geng Source Crystals, one hundred and twenty-nine thousand six hundred drops of immeasurable blood could be condensed in a short period of time.

It's a pity that the number of Blood Geng Source Crystals is too small, too rare, even one Blood Geng Source Crystal is enough for the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform to make a move.

"Hahahaha, I didn't expect to get a Blood Gengyuan Crystal in the Ruins Stone Tower!"

The Blood Ancestor said excitedly.

Although he knew that there was a ruin here, he really didn't know what he could get from the ruins, and this time he would make a lot of money just from this Blood Geng Source Crystal.

Swish!

The Blood Ancestor instantly entered the fifth layer.

And as soon as he came to the fifth layer, he didn't think about getting benefits from the fifth layer, but quickly refined the Blood Geng Source Crystal.

If he completely refined this Blood Geng Source Crystal, he was sure that he would advance his cultivation to the limit of the third stage, that is, the level of condensing 129,600 drops of immeasurable blood.

When the time comes, the whole body will be filled with immeasurable blood, and there will be a huge increase in strength.

In that case, the Xinghai Great Ancestor can't help him, even if he can't beat the Xinghai Great Ancestor, he is sure to save his life.

......

Another period of time passed, and the Great Ancestor of the Star Sea finally perfected the last incomplete immeasurable diagram and reached the standard, but the reward he received was slightly worse, not the Blood Geng Source Crystal.

Subsequently, the Great Ancestor of the Star Sea also entered the fifth layer of the Ruins Stone Tower.

In the years that followed, the number of high-level immeasurable lifeforms that entered the fifth layer gradually increased, but they were still very rare compared to the whole.

And Ye Tian had been staying on the fourth floor of the Ruins Stone Tower, and these high-level immeasurable lifeforms were coming and going, so he didn't pay attention to Ye Tian.

The fifth stele!

The Sixth Stele!

The seventh stele!

In the back, Ye Tian's speed of perfection is getting faster and faster, after all, he has the experience of perfecting several other incomplete immeasurable diagrams, so he naturally perfects faster.

In the end, Ye Tian spied on the ninth mutilated immeasurable map.

After seeing this incomplete infinite map, all nine incomplete infinite maps can be gathered together into a complete incomplete infinite map.

The immeasurable diagram of the birth of the ruins stone tower is already incomplete, but the degree of inadequacy is not too serious, and now Ye Tian has thoroughly perfected eight of them, and only needs to improve this one more, and then improve one as a whole, then you can obtain a complete immeasurable diagram.

The thought that he was about to obtain a complete immeasurable map made him naturally extremely excited.

Another period of time passed, and Ye Tian completely perfected this last incomplete diagram.

At this time, the nine incomplete immeasurable pictures were united in his heart.

Suddenly, the nine incomplete diagrams, which had been thoroughly perfected, now looked a little flawed.

So, Ye Tian continued to refine on the fourth layer, anyway, he had already thoroughly perfected these incomplete immeasurable diagrams, as long as he didn't leave, it would be impossible for the Ruins Stone Tower to kick him out.

With Ye Tian's continuous efforts, the infinite map is becoming more and more complete, and there are fewer and fewer defects.

In addition, the practice verification of the copy body is used to eliminate defects one by one.

"Succeeded, the infinite graph has been completely perfected, and now it can be regarded as a complete infinite graph. It only takes some years to realize a Mahayana immeasurable body from it!" Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently, his other copied bodies began to create Mahayana immeasurable bodies specifically from the immeasurable diagram, and his Xuan Ming Great Ancestor's copied body directly showed the results and was ready to enter the fifth layer.

Rumble!!!!

As soon as Ye Tiangang showed his results, the ruins stone tower shook.

Suddenly, many high-level immeasurable lifeforms that were still in the ruin stone tower were alarmed, but they didn't know why the ruin stone tower was shaking.

"I can't be the one who caused it, right?"

Ye Tian secretly guessed.

At this moment, the benefits of the ruinstone tower came to him.

Airplanes!

A golden grain of sand appeared in the palm of his hand, and he quickly put it away.

Other high-level immeasurable lifeforms saw it, but they didn't know what it was.

Many treasures have the appearance of golden grains of sand, but to look at the treasures, you naturally can't look at the appearance, but also look at the breath and essence.

And the aura of this treasure is very unfamiliar, they have not seen it, so naturally they don't know it.

Only Ye Tian himself knew that this treasure was not ordinary, and he was afraid that it was far above the Blood Geng Source Crystal.

Because when he just received this treasure, he felt quite difficult, and after the aura emitted by this treasure was absorbed by him, he was actually refining his immeasurable bones, and even refining his flesh and blood body, so that the flesh and blood body was raised a little, which seemed to be very weak, but it was only touched just now!

It is conceivable that this treasure is enough to greatly increase his cultivation speed, and it also has unimaginable benefits.

"When we get out, let's study this treasure again!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Airplanes!

A pillar of light enveloped Ye Tian, directly sending Ye Tian to the fifth layer.

And at this level, he also saw other high-level immeasurable lifeforms, such as the Blood Ancestor.

But at this moment, the aura of the Vicious Blood Ancestor was much stronger than before, and because the breakthrough was too fast, the aura on his body was a little difficult to reinforce, it was really too powerful.
